name: Floodgate Archive Rescue
description: Equalize mass-conserving vault water levels, transfer a floating capsule through three locks, and avoid flooding paper archives.
natural_language: Move the evidence capsule through every lock without raising any archive above its red flood line.

metadata.notes: New Interaction VII–VIII candidate. The browser renders the generated physical state and records only ordinary pointer/keyboard control events; the live server and exported verifier independently replay the mechanic-specific geometry or dynamics.
